nasb.text: When they were bringing out the money which had been brought into the house of the Lord, Hilkiah the priest found the book of the law of the Lord  given by Moses.

esv.text: While they were bringing out the money that had been brought into the house of the Lord, Hilkiah the priest found the Book of the Law of the Lord given through Moses.

cnv.text: 他們把獻給耶和華殿的銀子拿出來的時候，希勒家祭司發現了耶和華藉摩西所傳的律法書。

ccb.text: 他们把奉献到耶和华殿里的银子拿出来的时候，希勒迦祭司发现了摩西所传的耶和华的律法书。
